---
title: Papers
---

These are user-reviewed per-paper notes. They are distinct from the reading queue: each page records material the user has read and chosen to retain.

> 此处为用户已阅读并选择保留的逐篇笔记；它不同于候选文献队列。

- [Cohen 2014: Arctic amplification](cohen2014.qmd)
- [Dai & Wang 2018: Early-2000s hiatus](dai2018.qmd)
- [Fyfe et al. 2016: Warming slowdown](fyfe2016.qmd)
- [Rodionov 2004: Sequential regime-shift test](rodionov2004.qmd)
- [Xiao & Ren 2023: North Pacific regime shift](xiao2023.qmd)
- [Xie & Kosaka 2017: Causes of the warming hiatus](xie2017.qmd)
- [Yan et al. 2016: Slowdown or redistribution](yan2016.qmd)
